resources.string: Start a capture session, open the camera, and begin collecting frames for the plate pipeline.
This prototype opens the camera preview, detects plates, saves the best crop, runs ONNX OCR, and shows the latest recognition result live.
Opening camera stream and ALPR debug pipeline\u2026

Point the rear camera at a plate and keep it steady. The app will detect a likely plate, run OCR, and open a review dialog when a possible violation is found. If detection struggles, use Capture Center Plate to grab a centered crop manually.

Overlay colors: yellow = static scene candidate, cyan = filtered plate-like region, green = tracked region accepted for OCR. When a possible violation is found, review the crop, confirm or edit the extracted plate, then capture a full-vehicle evidence photo.
Camera permission is required to run a live ALPR session.
Registry status: plate not found in registry
Aim at the full vehicle, then capture when it is framed clearly.
